subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Fire of Manifestation hath blazed forth and been made manifest from the blessed Tree, and the Light of Oneness shineth from the horizon of the heaven of Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله نار ظهور از شجره مبارکه مشتعل و ظاهر و نور احدیه از افق سماء اراده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
